name: HWR_SRVY_ACTIVE_QSTNR
description: This will store the information regarding which questionnaire is currently active for a particular line manager. Table specific for meeting survey. This will also store the questionaires and ownwership mapping.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber ID associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: LINE_MANAGER_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FUSION id of the owner of the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID of the Questionnaire being identified in this record.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: This determines if this Questionnaire is the Active Questionnaire for the corresponding Line Manager.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: ACTIVE_QSTNR_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
